examples.title: Servlet Lifecycle Pseudocode
examples.code:
ALGORITHM ServletLifecycle
INPUT: ServletConfig config
OUTPUT: None

BEGIN
 init(config)
 WHILE true DO
 service()
 END WHILE
 destroy()
END
examples.explanation: The servlet lifecycle consists of initialization, service, and destruction phases.

examples.explanation: This Java servlet example demonstrates how to handle HTTP GET requests and generate an HTML response.
